hypothesis: If a hybrid Transformer-Mamba encoder-decoder model is pre-trained jointly on multiple molecular representation modalities (SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, IUPAC, formula, polymer, and electrolyte formats) using aligned multimodal objectives, then it will learn a unified latent space that enables accurate cross-modal molecular translation and superior property prediction performance across diverse chemical domains compared to single-modality approaches, because shared representations across modalities capture complementary structural and chemical information that generalizes better to downstream tasks.
